summary: Plan-only remediation assessment for five open PR inventory candidates. No GitHub mutations are recommended without missing merge-preflight proof; two small contributor PRs need refreshed repair/merge preflight before any executable fix action can be emitted, and one broad WhatsApp feature PR needs maintainer judgment before repair or merge.

Broad feature surface plus failing checks and unresolved review-bot findings require maintainer judgment before repair, split, or merge planning.
